subtopic: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies
title: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies: A trader enters into a short position in a futures...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: A trader enters into a short position in a futures contract. This implies that they:

options.text: A short position in a futures contract indicates that the trader expects the
Difference between spot and futures prices

solution: A short position in a futures contract indicates that the trader expects the price of the underlying asset to fall before the contract expires. [[24]]
